# CANDIDATE: V14_BASELINE_OOS_VALIDATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** validation_request
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-OOS + NEEDS-REAL-FILLS)

## Hypothesis

Baseline v14 params (vol_mult=1.1, tp1_premium_pct=0.4, runner_target_pct=3.0) should hold OOS across 2025-Q3 through 2026-Q2 with edge_capture >= 771. This validates the baseline before considering swept params from #12 (tp1=0.30, runner=2.5).

## Mechanism

**Walk-forward:**
- IS: 2025-01-01 to 2025-06-30 (6 months)
- OOS: 2025-07-01 to 2026-06-30 (12 months)
- Params: vol_mult=1.1, tp1_premium_pct=0.4, runner_target_pct=3.0, profit_lock_arm=0.05, profit_lock_trail=0.10

**Real-fills:**
- Run simulator_real.py on J anchors: 4/29, 5/01, 5/04
- Compare to BS-sim baseline

## Expected impact on OP-16 anchors

| J day | Current engine behavior | Proposed behavior | Delta |

| 4/29 winner | +$342 | +$342 (baseline captures) | 0 |
| 5/01 winner | +$470 | +$470 (baseline captures) | 0 |

**Projected edge_capture:** ~$1,542 (all winners) minus any loser delta. Should meet 771 threshold.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** $25K+ for 28 contracts; $1K paper ~14% of headline
2. **Sample bias:** Single config validation (not sweep) — limited generalizability
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS — walk-forward pending
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS — simulator_real.py pending
5. **Failure modes:** OOS P&L negative, WF ratio < 0.50, real-fills > 20% off BS-sim
6. **Concentration:** Unknown until OOS complete

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] OOS P&L > 0
- [ ] WF ratio >= 0.50
- [ ] Real-fills within 20% of BS-sim on J anchors
- [ ] edge_capture >= 771

## Confidence

5/10 — baseline params likely work but need OOS validation. #12 already showed swept params (tp1=0.30, runner=2.5) OOS PASS. Need to confirm baseline is competitive before declaring sweep a meaningful improvement.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

- Complements #12 V14E_PARAM_SWEEP_26K (swept params OOS PASS)
- If baseline OOS fails but swept passes, confirms sweep value-add
- If baseline OOS passes, validates current production params are sound
